briefdescription.para: Set the LED GPIO output based on polarity.
Toggle the LED (only meaningful in ON/OFF modes).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_LED *led, uint16_t on_ms, uint16_t off_ms, uint8_t count)
memberdef.name: syn_led_flash

briefdescription.para: Flash the LED N times, then turn off.

detaileddescription.para: Pattern characters: '.' = short on (1 unit) '-' = long on (3 units) ' ' = pause (1 unit) '|' = long pause (3 units)
The pattern repeats indefinitely. Set a null or empty string to stop.
Call from your main loop or a scheduler task.

briefdescription.para: Milliseconds until the next state transition.

detaileddescription.para: Returns 0 if a transition is overdue, UINT32_MAX if the LED is static (ON or OFF). Useful for sleeping in a protothread:
